servinfo.title: Front Brake Disc Removal and Installation

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage front brake flexible hoses.
Never depress brake pedal during service operation shown below.
Check for leakage of brake fluid when removing front brake pads and repair front brake caliper if leakage is found.
Replace all front brake pads at the same time even if only one front brake pad is defective.

s1.ptxt: Hoist vehicle and remove front wheel.
Remove front brake caliper carrier bolts (1) and remove front brake caliper (2) from steering knuckle.

item.ptxt: Hang removed front brake caliper with a wire hook to prevent front brake flexible hose from bending, twisting excessively or being pulled.
Do not operate brake pedal with brake caliper removed.

s1.ptxt: Pull off front brake disc (2) by M8 bolts (1).

attention2.ptxt: Do not twist front brake flexible hose when installing front brake caliper.

s1.ptxt: Install front brake disc to front wheel hub.
Install front brake caliper to steering knuckle and tighten front brake caliper carrier bolts to specified torque.
Check that brake system operates properly.
